description: Complete meeting intelligence pipeline with decision tracking and action items
input: Run meeting intelligence on this Notion meeting page: https://www.notion.so/meeting-q2-strategy-2026-abc123. Track all decisions and action items.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Fetches meeting content from Notion page
Phase 2: Runs multi-perspective PM analysis (pm-execution summarize-meeting)
Phase 3: Extracts decisions with context, rationale, and participants; logs to decision-tracker
Phase 4: Extracts action items with owners and deadlines; logs to meeting-action-tracker
Phase 5: Performs trend analysis against previous meetings (if history exists)
Phase 6: Generates summary.md and action-items.md; uploads to Notion as sub-pages
success_criteria: Notion sub-pages created for summary and action items; decisions logged; action items tracked with owners; outputs saved to outputs/meeting-intelligence-system/{date}/

description: Process a raw meeting transcript pasted directly
input:
다음 회의록을 분석해줘:

참석자: 김PM, 이개발, 박디자인
일시: 2026-04-10

김PM: Q3 런칭을 7월로 앞당기겠습니다.
이개발: 기술적으로 가능하지만 테스트 기간이 부족합니다.
박디자인: 디자인 QA는 6월 중순까지 완료 가능합니다.
김PM: 결정: 7월 1일 런칭, 테스트는 6월 15일-30일.
액션: 이개발 - 6월 14일까지 테스트 계획서 작성
액션: 박디자인 - 6월 10일까지 최종 디자인 납품
expected_behavior: Accepts raw transcript without Notion source
Identifies 1 decision: Q3 launch moved to July 1
Identifies 2 action items with owners and deadlines
Generates Korean summary with structured format
success_criteria: Decision extracted with rationale; 2 action items with owners (이개발, 박디자인) and dates; Korean output

description: Trend analysis across multiple meeting records
input: Run trend analysis on the last 4 weekly team meetings in Notion. What topics keep recurring? Any unresolved actions?
expected_behavior: Queries Notion for recent meeting pages
Reads existing meeting intelligence outputs from outputs/meeting-intelligence-system/
Flags overdue or unresolved action items from previous meetings
Produces trend-analysis.md with topic frequency, decision patterns, and action item completion rate
success_criteria: trend-analysis.md generated with cross-meeting patterns; overdue items flagged; topic frequency chart or table included

description: Simple meeting summary without intelligence should route to pm-execution
input: Summarize this meeting transcript into bullet points
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for simple summarization
Request should route to pm-execution summarize-meeting or meeting-digest
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to pm-execution or meeting-digest

description: Calendar management should not trigger this skill
input: Schedule a meeting with the engineering team for next Tuesday at 2pm
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for scheduling
Request should route to gws-calendar or smart-meeting-scheduler
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to calendar skills
